Class BulletSystem.BulletConfig

java.lang.Object
xyz.yaszu.freedom.Util.BulletSystem.BulletConfig
Enclosing class:
BulletSystem
public static class BulletSystem.BulletConfig extends Object
Configuration class for bullet behavior
